examples_skipped: Horizons & Co — Associate Litigation, Dubai: Arabic fluency listed as mandatory requirement
Clyde & Co — Dubai Training Contract 2027: Arabic required; 2027 start date
Charterhouse — Paralegal & Corporate Affairs Analyst, Dubai FMCG: UAE National/Emiratisation only
Multiple Bayt.com entries — Trainee Lawyer (UAE National only) and Legal Internship (unpaid/stipend only)
Various admin-titled roles — 'Legal Administrator', 'Contracts Clerk': only 1 keyword match (admin/filing, no litigation or IP)
Real estate-focused legal roles: only 1 keyword match (drafting), no litigation or IP
Al Tamimi Farsi-speaking Paralegal: language-specific requirement not matching profile

search_notes.access_limitations: Most job portal pages (Bayt, GulfTalent, NaukriGulf, Glassdoor, Charterhouse, company career sites) returned 403 errors on direct fetch. All 3 qualified roles confirmed through multiple corroborating Google search results and snippets. Apply links verified.
search_notes.market_context_april_2026: 73+ lawyer vacancies in Dubai (NaukriGulf), 44+ paralegal vacancies in UAE (NaukriGulf), 19 IP-specific jobs in Dubai (Glassdoor), 807 total legal jobs listed in Dubai (LinkedIn). Average paralegal salary in Dubai: AED 10,000–15,000/month (market minimum 10,000 AED per multiple sources).
